sourceOverview.notes: OpenAI models + own. TTS: 400+ voices, 140+ languages, Custom Neural Voice. STT: Whisper + custom models.

audit.priceRangeSummary: Azure OpenAI pricing depends on selected partner model and region. Azure Speech has F0 (free) and S0 paid tiers; voice and STT pricing vary by feature/region.
audit.limitsSummary: Speech preview docs cite <300 MB and <120 min/file for some batch flows. Voice Live sessions max ~60 min/connection. Model retirement cadence matters on Azure OpenAI.
audit.regionSummary: Region-specific Azure deployment; customer chooses region where offered. Speech/LLM availability is not uniform across all Azure regions.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: Broad multilingual support; Whisper plus Azure speech/custom models.
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes: Azure Speech F0; separate trial/credits may apply for Azure/OpenAI subscriptions.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Treat Azure OpenAI and Azure Speech as separate product surfaces under one billing umbrella. Add model retirement monitoring.

models.publicName: Azure OpenAI / Azure AI Foundry catalog

supplementalResearch.title: 4. Microsoft Azure (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 4. Microsoft Azure (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Full speech stack.

Azure OpenAI offers GPT-5.x, GPT-4.1, o-series models at **identical pricing to direct OpenAI**. Fine-tuning adds $1.70–$3.00/hr overhead.

**Azure Speech TTS:** **500+ neural voices** across **140+ languages**. Neural voices: **$16/1M chars**. HD voices (LLM-powered emotion): available. Custom Neural Voice: $24/1M chars. Free tier: **0.5M chars/month** (always free). SSML fully supported. WebSocket streaming via Speech SDK. Regions: 50+ Azure regions.

**Azure Speech STT:** **$1.00/hr** real-time, **$0.36/hr** batch. 100+ languages. Free tier: **5 hrs/month** (always free). Custom models, diarization, language ID. WebSocket streaming. Commitment: volume tiers down to $0.50/hr.

GDPR: Full EU data residency, 50+ compliance certifications including HIPAA, FedRAMP.
